summary: Action Visibility System testing complete. 12/12 backend tests passed. Frontend 3-step post wizard working: Step 1 (Create) has all form fields with proper validation, Step 2 (Visibility) shows Public/Private cards with flow tags (Reactions→Trust→Profile), Step 3 (Review) shows visibility badge and trust flow steps for public actions. Success state displays correctly after publish. Feed page shows visibility tabs (All/Public/My Private) and visibility badges on cards. Trust outcome indicator shows arrow→profile.

integration_issues.issue: Generic 'Network error. Try again.' message shown instead of actual error (429 Rate limit: max 5 actions per hour)

issues: Console warning about span inside select/option - React hydration issue (non-blocking)

action_items: LOW: Improve error handling in PostAction.js to show actual API error message (e.g., 'Rate limit exceeded') instead of generic 'Network error'
critical_code_review_comments: PostAction.js 3-step wizard correctly implemented with proper state management and data-testids
ActionFeed.js visibility tabs correctly filter by visibility param and viewer_id
Backend actions.py correctly stores visibility field and filters feed based on viewer_id and visibility param
Trust flow steps (4-5-6) only shown for public actions in Step 3 review
Post success state shows correct outcome messages based on visibility (public vs private)
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all major features verified, 1 minor UX issue with error messages)

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test actions via backend tests (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Action Visibility System fully tested. Key data-testids: post-steps, step-1/2/3, step-create, step-visibility, step-publish, input-title/description/category/community/location, next-to-visibility, visibility-public/private, next-to-publish, publish-preview, publish-visibility-badge, publish-trust-flow, submit-action-btn, post-success, post-flow-outcome, go-to-feed-btn. Feed testids: feed-vis-tabs, vis-tab-all/public/private, vis-badge-{id}, trust-outcome-{id}. Rate limit is 5 actions/hour per user - use different user if testing publish.
